name: logistics managers at freight brokers processing 10-50 shipments/month tool
description: For logistics managers at freight brokers processing 10-50 shipments/month, inefficient route planning causes increased shipping costs. We provide route planning recommendations instead of manual route planning and cost analysis.

problem_solved: inefficient route planning leading to increased shipping costs
